name: vetinari-ui-audit
description: Isolated audit-extras manifest for axe-core, Lighthouse, and Playwright audit lanes. Not part of the main Svelte build.

scripts.audit:axe: cd .. && node node_modules/@playwright/test/cli.js test tests/e2e/help_a11y.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.js --grep axe_no_violations_term
